Year: This column represents the year when the knowledge-sharing session was conducted.
Organizer_Role: This column represents the job role of the person who organized the knowledge-sharing session.
Department: This column represents the department for which the knowledge-sharing session was organized.
Target_Audience: This column represents the target audience for the knowledge-sharing session.
Objective: This column represents the objective of the knowledge-sharing session.
Session_Count: This column represents the number of knowledge-sharing sessions conducted in that year.
Source_of_Information: This column represents the source from where the information about the knowledge-sharing session was obtained.
